rationale: Wire RateLimitHook into the hooks package default export. Issue #332 adds rate-limit enforcement for the Evolver at the hook layer, preventing more than DEFAULT_MAX_PROPOSALS_PER_HOUR evolver proposals per rolling hour. The RateLimitHook is implemented in harness/hooks/rate_limit.py (new file, added in same PR). This ProposedEdit adds the import and __all__ entry so 'import harness.hooks' exposes RateLimitHook and register_into — mirroring the injection_firewall export pattern. Per AGENTS.md section 2 this file is harness DNA and may not be hand-edited; it must be routed through the Evolver->Critic pipeline (ADR-0004). The hook self-registers on import (unlike context_pruning) because it uses process-global state in _RL_STATE that is safe to initialize at module load time. SECURITY.md §Guardrails requires this rate-limit hook; issue #332 is the tracking issue.
unified_diff:
--- a/harness/hooks/__init__.py
+++ b/harness/hooks/__init__.py
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 from .base import Hook, HookRegistry, get_registry, register_hook
 from .injection_firewall import InjectionFirewallHook, INJECTION_PATTERNS
+from .rate_limit import RateLimitHook, register_into
 
 # Importing this package activates the prompt-injection firewall mandated by
 # docs/SECURITY.md (the hook self-registers on import).
 __all__ = [
     "Hook",
     "HookRegistry",
     "get_registry",
     "register_hook",
     "InjectionFirewallHook",
     "INJECTION_PATTERNS",
+    "RateLimitHook",
+    "register_into",
 ]
